coreJobStatement: Design and manufacture pump systems that convert mechanical shaft energy into controlled fluid flow at specified pressure, throughput, and efficiency for industrial process applications
hierarchy: Process VN (L7 through L4) — pump and fluid handling manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~USD 48B total (2025), positive displacement segment USD 20.8B (2025) -> USD 33.9B (2035), CAGR 5.0%

l6Systems.name: Material & Blank Procurement
l6Systems.jobFamily: Source and receive steel billets, castings, and semi-finished profile blanks as raw inputs for all pump components

l6Systems.name: Component Machining
l6Systems.jobFamily: Transform raw/semi-finished inputs into precision-dimensioned pump internals (rotors, crescent inserts, impeller blanks, shafts)

l6Systems.name: Surface Treatment & Hardening
l6Systems.jobFamily: Harden, plate, or coat wear-critical pump components to achieve specified surface hardness, corrosion resistance, and dimensional stability

l6Systems.name: Assembly & Integration
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble rotor packs, seal cartridges, bearing housings, and couplings into complete pump units at specified axial/radial clearances

l6Systems.name: Performance Testing & Qualification
l6Systems.jobFamily: Validate pump output against specified flow rate, head, efficiency, leakage, vibration, and noise acceptance criteria

l6Systems.name: Packaging & Dispatch
l6Systems.jobFamily: Package, certify, and ship qualified pump units to OEM customers or distribution

l6Systems.name: Quality & Metrology (H)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Dimensional inspection, CMM measurement, test cert issuance - runs across all core steps

vnUnits.name: Precision-formed Steel Profile Blanks
vnUnits.functionalJob: ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION. Cold-drawn near-net-shape profiles (~15-25% of steel input by value for profile-critical pumps). Feeds inner rotor, crescent insert, housing bore liner, and drive shaft blanks. Alternatives: Ground/turned bar stock (~55-65%), Forged steel blanks (~15-25%).
vnUnits.description: Custom-cross-section rotor/shaft profiles for gear, screw, vane pumps

vnUnits.name: Cast Iron / Ductile Iron Pump Castings
vnUnits.functionalJob: Sand casting (~70%), investment casting (~20%), die casting (~10%). Primary input for pump housings and larger impeller bodies.

vnUnits.name: CNC Turning & Milling Centers
vnUnits.functionalJob: 5-axis CNC (~70%), 3-axis CNC (~25%), manual turning (~5%). Dominant for complex impellers, housings, and precision rotor profiles.

vnUnits.name: Gear Cutting Machines
vnUnits.functionalJob: Gear hobbing (~55%, external gears), gear broaching (~35%, internal gears), wire EDM (~10%, complex profiles).

zollernPosition: ZOLLERN holds PRIMARY position at L5 Precision-formed Steel Profile Blanks under L6a Material & Blank Procurement. Supplies custom-cross-section rotor/shaft profiles for gear, screw, and vane pumps. Highest differentiation on crescent insert profiles.
strategicPosition: ZOLLERN wins in dimensional precision and hardness consistency domain. BAR stock is the dominant incumbent (~60%) with zero tooling dependency. ZOLLERN's value is delivering blanks already at final tolerance and hardness - where bar stock is structurally weakest.
